rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type scopes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Use implementation scopes only for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Place assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports in valid component type scopes
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names for assumptions and guarantees
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign clauses
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when describing interface behavior
Use implementation annexes only for implementation-level bindings
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Use boolean logic for complex expressions
Use named constants for concrete bounds or thresholds
Use valid feature names from visible symbols
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not redesign architecture during fusion or repair
